mapper.sql: id, ticket_no, user_id, client_uid_snapshot, ticket_type, subject, content, order_no, character_id, character_name, status, priority, source, latest_message_preview, message_count, last_user_reply_at, last_admin_reply_at, last_message_at, closed_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_support_ticket ( ticket_no, user_id, client_uid_snapshot, ticket_type, subject, content, order_no, character_id, character_name, status, priority, source, latest_message_preview, message_count, last_user_reply_at, last_admin_reply_at, last_message_at, closed_at ) VALUES ( #{ticketNo}, #{userId}, #{clientUidSnapshot}, #{ticketType}, #{subject}, #{content}, #{orderNo}, #{characterId}, #{characterName}, #{status}, #{priority}, #{source}, #{latestMessagePreview}, #{messageCount}, #{lastUserReplyAt}, #{lastAdminReplyAt}, #{lastMessageAt}, #{closedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM app_support_ticket WHERE ticket_no = #{ticketNo} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE app_support_ticket SET status = #{status}, priority = #{priority}, latest_message_preview = #{latestMessagePreview}, message_count = #{messageCount}, last_user_reply_at = #{lastUserReplyAt}, last_admin_reply_at = #{lastAdminReplyAt}, last_message_at = #{lastMessageAt}, closed_at = #{closedAt} WHERE id = #{id}

where.if: AND ( ticket_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR subject LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(order_no, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(character_name, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select:
SELECT FROM app_support_ticket
ORDER BY last_message_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
